3233510.name: Icy Shores
3233510.description:
Icy Shores is a 3D adventure game with clicker elements. You and your sister lived in a cozy house on the edge of a dense forest, surrounded by trees. Your days were filled with adventures, but one day everything changed. Goblins living in the darkest corners of the forest broke into your house and kidnapped your sister!

According to rumors, the goblins went to the "Icy Shores" - a lost land of eternal winters, where the leader - Quark - rules! You can't leave your sister to her fate and go on a journey to save her.

Fight goblins, overcome various obstacles, make your way through dense forests, cross icy rivers to save your sister!
